body:
This pull request changes the compat entry for the `Compat` package from `2.2.0` to `2.2.0, 3.3`.

This keeps the compat entries for earlier versions.

Note: I have not tested your package with this new compat entry. It is your responsibility to make sure that your package tests pass before you merge this pull request.
title: CompatHelper: bump compat for "Compat" to "3.3"

body:
This pull request changes the compat entry for the `Compat` package from `2.2.0` to `2.2.0, 3.4`.

This keeps the compat entries for earlier versions.

Note: I have not tested your package with this new compat entry. It is your responsibility to make sure that your package tests pass before you merge this pull request.
title: CompatHelper: bump compat for "Compat" to "3.4"
